meta.name: Verity — Gallery Matcha
meta.description: Premium warm-gallery register. Light and dark are equal citizens: every color token carries both values.

brass.role: premium metal detail — hairlines, dividers, active glass edges

space.rule: section spacing >= 2x component spacing; density increases with data, not decoration

display.note: variable, optical sizing — premium editorial serif

motion.rule: every animation maps to a state change or spatial relation; prefers-reduced-motion honored globally

glass.rule: glow = hierarchy signal only — max one glowing element per view; brass edge on active glass; chromatic gradient-mesh ground in BOTH themes
